title: The Future of Potions?
description:
You feel a faint rumbling as you round the corner to discover a gigantic spinning apparatus!
It has several slots which appear to convert liquids into a highly compressed digestible tablet.

The idea of turning these health tonics into a tiny morsel is uncomfortable but perhaps it's good to try new things?
conditions: All players must have at least 2 potions
notes:
One option appears for each of your first [gold]3[/gold] potions (up to 3 total). Selecting a potion sacrifices it and presents a choice of [gold]3 Upgraded[/gold] cards.

[gold]Potion rarity → Card rarity:[/gold] Rare or Event potion → [gold]Rare[/gold] card; Uncommon potion → [gold]Uncommon[/gold] card; Common or Token potion → [gold]Common[/gold] card.

[gold]Card type[/gold] is chosen randomly from Attack, Skill, and Power. Common and Token potions cannot produce Power cards.

You cannot remove potions during this event.
